name: Carrot Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, saute shredded carrots and chopped onion in butter until tender.
2. Add the cooked rice and stir to coat it evenly with the butter.
3. Stir in the chicken broth and lemon pepper; bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Per serving: 137 calories, 1 gram fat.
